steps.title: Find the main verb
steps.content: The subject is "Louisiana resident P.B.S. Pinchback." The sentence needs a finite main verb to state what Pinchback did in 1868.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: A is an infinitive, C is a present participle, and D is a perfect participle. None can serve as the main verb of the sentence by itself. The simple past-tense verb fits the completed event in 1868. The answer is B.
